title: 🧹 Refactor comments to avoid static analysis false positives
description:
🎯 **What:** Reworded comments in `src/lib/onboard.ts` to avoid starting with Javascript keywords (`for`, `if`, `var`).
💡 **Why:** A static analysis tool incorrectly flagged these comments as "Dead Code: Commented out logic" because they matched a regex for commented-out code (e.g. `// for ...`). Rewording them resolves the false positive and improves code health.
✅ **Verification:** Ran `npm run format`, `npm run lint`, and `npm run verify:core` locally to verify that no functional changes were made and tests still pass.
✨ **Result:** Static analysis tools will no longer flag these comments as dead code, improving the signal-to-noise ratio of code health reports.

Signed-off-by: Jules <jules@example.com>
